# Anesthesia Workstations Wave 2 Category Pack

## Required Fields

- Manufacturer, model, variant;
- ventilation modes;
- gas delivery;
- vaporizers;
- breathing system;
- monitoring;
- scavenging;
- power/battery;
- workstation options.

## Required Documents

- Registration certificate;
- user manual/IFU;
- technical specification;
- vaporizer/accessory compatibility list;
- service manual if public.

## Key Characteristics

- Fresh gas flow range;
- ventilator type;
- supported modes;
- tidal volume range;
- oxygen/air/N2O supply;
- vaporizer compatibility;
- display/control interface;
- backup power;
- integrated monitoring.

## Compatibility Requirements

- Vaporizers;
- breathing circuits;
- CO2 absorbers;
- gas cylinders;
- monitors/modules;
- scavenging systems.

## Common Conflicts

- Vaporizers are option-dependent.
- Integrated monitoring differs by configuration.
- Regional gas standards differ.
- Accessories listed in brochures may not be included.

## Review Notes

Treat gas delivery, vaporizer compatibility and ventilation modes as critical review fields.
